name: Plausible Analytics
description: Plausible is a lightweight, privacy-friendly web analytics platform. Query visitor stats, pageviews, traffic sources, and goal conversions without cookies or personal data tracking.

capabilities.name: get_realtime_visitors
capabilities.description: Get the current number of visitors on a site in real-time.

capabilities.name: get_aggregate_stats
capabilities.description: Get aggregate statistics (visitors, pageviews, bounce rate) for a time period.

capabilities.name: get_timeseries
capabilities.description: Get time-series data for metrics over a date range.

capabilities.name: get_breakdown
capabilities.description: Break down metrics by a property like page, source, country, or device.

capabilities.name: send_event
capabilities.description: Send a custom pageview or event to Plausible.

capabilities.name: manage_sites
capabilities.description: Create, update, or delete sites from your Plausible account.
